creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please do the following repo copies. For the new gtk+-3 version
	and its c++ bindings.

	x11-toolkits/gtk20 -> x11-toolkits/gtk30
	x11-toolkits/gtk20-reference -> x11-toolkits/gtk30-reference
	x11-toolkits/gtk20mm -> x11-toolkits/gtkmm30
	x11-toolkits/gtk20mm-reference -> x11-toolkits/gtkmm30-reference
